series_metadata.series_description: These records include documents related to interstate bank applications, including copies of cooperative agreements.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility five (5) years from date received ; Electronic: electronic files five (5) years from date received
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
